title: ipomoea multiflora
intro: Ipomoea multiflora, also known as the many-flowered morning glory, is a type of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and providing relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Ipomoea multiflora is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
